title: More unique zombies
description: Zombies, husks and drowneds can have items sticking out of their bodies when they spawn, making them a bit more unique.
body:
Zombies, husks and drowneds can have items sticking out of their bodies when they spawn, making them a bit more unique.

Also there is a small chance that these items will be dropped when they die, based on from what item list it came.

There are 4 tiers (lists)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-common (arrow)

-uncommon (wooden-, golden-, stone tools and spectral arrow)

-rare (iron tools and shears)

-epic (diamond tools)

</details>



 

These can be found and changed in the item tags folder.

The drop chance can be changed with the config file that can be found in the config folders.

And you can also change the chance what item list it should choose from when selecting the max 3 item.

 

Mod currently supports

**Forge 26.1.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.1**

**Neoforge 26.1.x | 1.21.x**

**Fabric 26.1.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.1**

 

SEND ME A PRIVATE MESSAGE IF YOU NEED THE MOD IN A DIFFERENT VERSION OR IF YOU ENCOUNTER ANY BUGS AT CURSEFORGE
